narrative:
West Chester Twp 30 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,127 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
